new_classes.label_de: Wodka in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (Unterposition 2208 60 91)
new_classes.definition_en: Vodka as defined under CN heading 2208 60, presented in containers of a nominal volume exceeding 2 litres, classified under subheading 2208 60 91.

coverage_explanation: The legal note for 22086091 (range 22086011–22086099) simply refers to "Vodka" and cross-references the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208, third paragraph (5), which describes vodka's characteristic organoleptic properties. The key distinguishing criterion captured here is: (1) the product is vodka (eucn:Vodka2208 subclass), (2) it is in containers > 2 L (someValuesFrom eucn:LargeContainer via BFO has_part), (3) it bears the VodkaCharacteristicQuality, and (4) it is produced by VodkaDistillationProcess. The sibling complement with VodkaSmallContainer22086011 establishes mutual exclusion with the ≤ 2 L subheading. Coverage is not 1.0 because the HS Explanatory Note content (specific organoleptic/compositional details for vodka under paragraph 5) is referenced but not reproduced in the legal notes provided, so some definitional nuance of what makes a spirit "vodka" per the HS EN cannot be fully axiomatised from the available text alone.
